tracks.meaning: to catch or fasten something with a curved or bent device designed for this purpose
a curved or barbed device attached to a line and used to catch fish
a curved or loop-shaped anatomical structure, such as a hook in the small intestine
a boxing punch delivered with a bent arm and rotational body movement
a catchy or memorable part of a song designed to lodge in a listener's mind
an attention-grabbing opening line or element designed to engage an audience
to steal or take something dishonestly
a curved device used to retrieve performers or props from the stage
a curved typographic element or flourish used in printing
a means of escaping or freeing oneself from difficulty or obligation
to establish a connection or link in a computing or network system
